'''pachasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngarara|ngarara]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngarara|ngarara]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pachasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæchæshæth|pæchæshæth]] || [[word:pæchæshæj|pæchæshæj]] || [[word:pæchæshæsh|pæchæshæsh]] || [[word:pæchæshæ|pæchæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachachashath|pachachashath]] || [[word:pachachashaj|pachachashaj]] || [[word:pachachashash|pachachashash]] || [[word:pachachasha|pachachasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachashath|pachashath]] || [[word:pachashaj|pachashaj]] || [[word:pachashash|pachashash]] || [[word:pachasha|pachasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachafshath|pachafshath]] || [[word:pachafshaj|pachafshaj]] || [[word:pachafshash|pachafshash]] || [[word:pachafshaf|pachafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pachashatha|pachashatha]] || [[word:pachashaja|pachashaja]] || [[word:pachashasha|pachashasha]] || [[word:pachashaka|pachashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pachashath|pachashath]] || [[word:pachashaj|pachashaj]] || [[word:pachashash|pachashash]] || [[word:pachasha|pachasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pachashathal|pachashathal]] || [[word:pachashajal|pachashajal]] || [[word:pachashashal|pachashashal]] || [[word:pachashakal|pachashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pachashathatha|pachashathatha]] || [[word:pachashajaja|pachashajaja]] || [[word:pachashashasha|pachashashasha]] || [[word:pachashaka|pachashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pachashathan|pachashathan]] || [[word:pachashajan|pachashajan]] || [[word:pachashashan|pachashashan]] || [[word:pachashakan|pachashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pachashathaoro|pachashathaoro]] || [[word:pachashajaoro|pachashajaoro]] || [[word:pachashashaoro|pachashashaoro]] || [[word:pachashakaoro|pachashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
